neotools.configuration.title: NeoTools Configs
config.neotools.gemstones.format: Bonus Format: [mining_speed, mining_speed_mult, attack_dmg, attack_dmg_mult, durability, durability_mult, fortune, exp_mult, enchantability]
config.neotools.gemstones.note: Use 0 or 1.0 for no bonus. Multipliers multiply base stats, bonuses add flat amounts.
